_note: Demonstration config for the Article 1 pilot. No network, no LLM, no keys.
article: Article 1 - Lifestyle Nutrition domains in dietary guides and clinical guidelines
notes: busca1 = official dietary guides; busca2a = clinical guidelines/consensus/statements. busca2b (interventions/efficacy) is outside the Article 1 core corpus. The behavioral framework is a later product.

output_layers.06_tables: derived evidence matrices and review queues
